state.output:
gws — Google Workspace CLI

USAGE:
    gws <service> <resource> [sub-resource] <method> [flags]
    gws schema <service.resource.method> [--resolve-refs]

EXAMPLES:
    gws drive files list --params '{"pageSize": 10}'
    gws drive files get --params '{"fileId": "abc123"}'
    gws sheets spreadsheets get --params '{"spreadsheetId": "..."}'
    gws gmail users messages list --params '{"userId": "me"}'
    gws schema drive.files.list

FLAGS:
    --params <JSON>       URL/Query parameters as JSON
    --json <JSON>         Request body as JSON (POST/PATCH/PUT)
    --upload <PATH>       Local file to upload as media content (multipart)
    --upload-content-type <MIME>  MIME type of the uploaded file (auto-detected from extension if omitted)
    --output <PATH>       Output file path for binary responses
    --format <FMT>        Output format: json (default), table, yaml, csv
    --api-version <VER>   Override the API version (e.g., v2, v3)
    --page-all            Auto-paginate, one JSON line per page (NDJSON)
    --page-limit <N>      Max pages to fetch with --page-all (default: 10)
    --page-delay <MS>     Delay between pages in ms (default: 100)

SERVICES:
    drive                Manage files, folders, and shared drives
    sheets               Read and write spreadsheets
    gmail                Send, read, and manage email
    calendar             Manage calendars and events
    admin-reports        Audit logs and usage reports (also: reports)
    docs                 Read and write Google Docs
    slides               Read and write presentations
    tasks                Manage task lists and tasks
    people               Manage contacts and profiles
    chat                 Manage Chat spaces and messages
    classroom            Manage classes, rosters, and coursework
    forms                Read and write Google Forms
    keep                 Manage Google Keep notes
    meet                 Manage Google Meet conferences
    events               Subscribe to Google Workspace events
    modelarmor           Filter user-generated content for safety
    workflow             Cross-service productivity workflows (also: wf)

ENVIRONMENT:
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_TOKEN               Pre-obtained OAuth2 access token (highest priority)
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_CREDENTIALS_FILE    Path to OAuth credentials JSON file
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_CLIENT_ID           OAuth client ID (for gws auth login)
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_CLIENT_SECRET       OAuth client secret (for gws auth login)
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_CONFIG_DIR          Override config directory (default: ~/.config/gws)
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_KEYRING_BACKEND     Keyring backend: keyring (default) or file
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_SANITIZE_TEMPLATE   Default Model Armor template
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_SANITIZE_MODE       Sanitization mode: warn (default) or block
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_PROJECT_ID              Override the GCP project ID for quota and billing
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_LOG                 Log level for stderr (e.g., gws=debug)
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_LOG_FILE            Directory for JSON log files (daily rotation)

EXIT CODES:
    0    Success
    1    API error  — Google returned an error response
    2    Auth error — credentials missing or invalid
    3    Validation — bad arguments or input
    4    Discovery  — could not fetch API schema
    5    Internal   — unexpected failure

COMMUNITY:
    Star the repo: https://github.com/googleworkspace/cli
    Report bugs / request features: https://github.com/googleworkspace/cli/issues
    Please search existing issues first; if one already exists, comment there.

DISCLAIMER:
    This is not an officially supported Google product.

metadata.output:
gws — Google Workspace CLI

USAGE:
    gws <service> <resource> [sub-resource] <method> [flags]
    gws schema <service.resource.method> [--resolve-refs]

EXAMPLES:
    gws drive files list --params '{"pageSize": 10}'
    gws drive files get --params '{"fileId": "abc123"}'
    gws sheets spreadsheets get --params '{"spreadsheetId": "..."}'
    gws gmail users messages list --params '{"userId": "me"}'
    gws schema drive.files.list

FLAGS:
    --params <JSON>       URL/Query parameters as JSON
    --json <JSON>         Request body as JSON (POST/PATCH/PUT)
    --upload <PATH>       Local file to upload as media content (multipart)
    --upload-content-type <MIME>  MIME type of the uploaded file (auto-detected from extension if omitted)
    --output <PATH>       Output file path for binary responses
    --format <FMT>        Output format: json (default), table, yaml, csv
    --api-version <VER>   Override the API version (e.g., v2, v3)
    --page-all            Auto-paginate, one JSON line per page (NDJSON)
    --page-limit <N>      Max pages to fetch with --page-all (default: 10)
    --page-delay <MS>     Delay between pages in ms (default: 100)

SERVICES:
    drive                Manage files, folders, and shared drives
    sheets               Read and write spreadsheets
    gmail                Send, read, and manage email
    calendar             Manage calendars and events
    admin-reports        Audit logs and usage reports (also: reports)
    docs                 Read and write Google Docs
    slides               Read and write presentations
    tasks                Manage task lists and tasks
    people               Manage contacts and profiles
    chat                 Manage Chat spaces and messages
    classroom            Manage classes, rosters, and coursework
    forms                Read and write Google Forms
    keep                 Manage Google Keep notes
    meet                 Manage Google Meet conferences
    events               Subscribe to Google Workspace events
    modelarmor           Filter user-generated content for safety
    workflow             Cross-service productivity workflows (also: wf)

ENVIRONMENT:
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_TOKEN               Pre-obtained OAuth2 access token (highest priority)
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_CREDENTIALS_FILE    Path to OAuth credentials JSON file
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_CLIENT_ID           OAuth client ID (for gws auth login)
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_CLIENT_SECRET       OAuth client secret (for gws auth login)
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_CONFIG_DIR          Override config directory (default: ~/.config/gws)
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_KEYRING_BACKEND     Keyring backend: keyring (default) or file
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_SANITIZE_TEMPLATE   Default Model Armor template
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_SANITIZE_MODE       Sanitization mode: warn (default) or block
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_PROJECT_ID              Override the GCP project ID for quota and billing
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_LOG                 Log level for stderr (e.g., gws=debug)
    GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_LOG_FILE            Directory for JSON log files (daily rotation)

EXIT CODES:
    0    Success
    1    API error  — Google returned an error response
    2    Auth error — credentials missing or invalid
    3    Validation — bad arguments or input
    4    Discovery  — could not fetch API schema
    5    Internal   — unexpected failure

COMMUNITY:
    Star the repo: https://github.com/googleworkspace/cli
    Report bugs / request features: https://github.com/googleworkspace/cli/issues
    Please search existing issues first; if one already exists, comment there.

DISCLAIMER:
    This is not an officially supported Google product.

metadata.description: Decode raw Gmail messages and extract readable body

input.command:
uv run python -c "import base64,json,subprocess,email,re,html; ids=['19cfb23959f8c189','19cfb0ac6e50b097','19cfa54d34dc252e']; for mid in ids: p=subprocess.run(['gws','gmail','users','messages','get','--params',json.dumps({'userId':'me','id':mid,'format':'raw'})],capture_output=True) out=(p.stdout or b'').decode('utf-8','replace') start=out.find('{') if start==-1: print('===MESSAGE===\nID:',mid,'\nERROR:no json') continue j=json.loads(out[start:]) raw=j.get('raw','') b=base64.urlsafe_b64decode(raw + '='*((4-len(raw)%4)%4)) msg=email.message_from_bytes(b) subj=msg.get('Subject','') frm=msg.get('From','') date=msg.get('Date','') text_parts=[]; html_parts=[] if msg.is_multipart(): for part in msg.walk(): if part.get_content_maintype()=='multipart': continue disp=str(part.get('Content-Disposition','')) if 'attachment' in disp.lower(): continue ctype=part.get_content_type() payload=part.get_payload(decode=True) or b'' cs=part.get_content_charset() or 'utf-8' content=payload.decode(cs,'replace') if ctype=='text/plain': text_parts.append(content) elif ctype=='text/html': html_parts.append(content) else: payload=msg.get_payload(decode=True) or b'' cs=msg.get_content_charset() or 'utf-8' text_parts.append(payload.decode(cs,'replace')) body='\n'.join([t.strip() for t in text_parts if t.strip()]) if not body: h='\n'.join([t for t in html_parts if t.strip()]) h=re.sub(r'<(script|style)[^>]*>.*?',' ',h,flags=re.S|re.I) h=re.sub(r'','\n',h,flags=re.I) h=re.sub(r'

||||','\n',h,flags=re.I) h=re.sub(r'<[^>]+>',' ',h) body=html.unescape(h) body=re.sub(r'\r','',body) body=re.sub(r'\n\s*\n+','\n\n',body) body=re.sub(r'[ \t]+',' ',body).strip() print('===MESSAGE===') print('ID:',mid) print('From:',frm) print('Subject:',subj) print('Date:',date) print('BodyPreview:',body[:2000].replace('\n',' | ')) "
input.description: Extract readable content from selected emails

input.command:
uv run python -c "import base64,json,subprocess,email,datetime,re
from email.utils import parseaddr
ids=['19cfb23959f8c189','19cfb0ac6e50b097','19cfa54d34dc252e']
run_marker=datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
selected=[]
for mid in ids:
 p=subprocess.run(['gws','gmail','users','messages','get','--params',json.dumps({'userId':'me','id':mid,'format':'raw'})],capture_output=True)
 out=(p.stdout or b'').decode('utf-8','replace')
 start=out.find('{')
 j=json.loads(out[start:])
 raw=j['raw']
 b=base64.urlsafe_b64decode(raw + '='*((4-len(raw)%4)%4))
 msg=email.message_from_bytes(b)
 subject=msg.get('Subject','(no subject)')
 from_name,from_addr=parseaddr(msg.get('From',''))
 reply_to_name,reply_to_addr=parseaddr(msg.get('Reply-To',''))
 to_addr=reply_to_addr or from_addr
 sender_name=(reply_to_name or from_name or to_addr.split('@')[0]).strip().strip('"')
 first_name=sender_name.split()[0] if sender_name else 'there'
 selected.append({'id':mid,'subject':subject,'to':to_addr,'first':first_name})

bodies=[]
for item in selected:
 subj=item['subject']
 if subj=='Security alert':
  body=(f"Hi {item['first']},\n\n"
        "Thanks for the security alert. I reviewed your message and will check my account activity to confirm the opencode access is expected. "
        "If anything looks unfamiliar, I will revoke access immediately and secure the account.\n\n"
        "Next step: I will open the activity link now and verify recent access.\n")
 elif 'shared something new' in subj:
  body=(f"Hi {item['first']},\n\n"
        "Thanks for the update that hassa.wassa shared something new. I saw your notification and will review the post when I am in Instagram.\n\n"
        "Next step: I will open Instagram today and check the shared post.\n")
 else:
  body=(f"Hi {item['first']},\n\n"
        "Thanks for the note that Canva AI has a new message and prompt suggestions for me. I received it and will try one of the suggested prompts.\n\n"
        "Next step: I will open Canva in my next session and test one prompt.\n")
 bodies.append(body)

created_subjects=[]
for item,body in zip(selected,bodies):
 draft_subject=f"[Run {run_marker}] — Reply: {item['subject']}"
 mime=(
  f"To: {item['to']}\r\n"
  f"Subject: {draft_subject}\r\n"
  "Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\r\n"
  "\r\n"
  f"{body}"
 )
 raw=base64.urlsafe_b64encode(mime.encode('utf-8')).decode('ascii').rstrip('=')
 payload={'message':{'raw':raw}}
 subprocess.run(['gws','gmail','users','drafts','create','--params',json.dumps({'userId':'me'}),'--json',json.dumps(payload)],capture_output=True,check=True)
 created_subjects.append(draft_subject)

total=sum(len(b) for b in bodies)
print(json.dumps({'count':len(created_subjects),'subjects':created_subjects,'total_chars':total},ensure_ascii=False))
"

metadata.description: Create three Gmail reply drafts with run marker

input.command:
uv run python - <<'PY'
import base64, json, subprocess, email, datetime
from email.utils import parseaddr

ids = ['19cfb23959f8c189', '19cfb0ac6e50b097', '19cfa54d34dc252e']
run_marker = datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')

selected = []
for mid in ids:
    p = subprocess.run([
        'gws', 'gmail', 'users', 'messages', 'get',
        '--params', json.dumps({'userId': 'me', 'id': mid, 'format': 'raw'})
    ], capture_output=True)
    out = (p.stdout or b'').decode('utf-8', 'replace')
    start = out.find('{')
    data = json.loads(out[start:])
    raw = data['raw']
    msg_bytes = base64.urlsafe_b64decode(raw + '=' * ((4 - len(raw) % 4) % 4))
    msg = email.message_from_bytes(msg_bytes)

    subject = msg.get('Subject', '(no subject)')
    from_name, from_addr = parseaddr(msg.get('From', ''))
    reply_name, reply_addr = parseaddr(msg.get('Reply-To', ''))
    to_addr = reply_addr or from_addr
    sender_name = (reply_name or from_name or to_addr.split('@')[0]).strip().strip('"')
    first_name = sender_name.split()[0] if sender_name else 'there'

    selected.append({'subject': subject, 'to': to_addr, 'first': first_name})

bodies = []
for item in selected:
    subj = item['subject']
    if subj == 'Security alert':
        body = (
            f"Hi {item['first']},\n\n"
            "Thanks for the security alert. I reviewed your message and will check my account activity to confirm the opencode access is expected. "
            "If anything looks unfamiliar, I will revoke access immediately and secure the account.\n\n"
            "Next step: I will open the activity link now and verify recent access.\n"
        )
    elif 'shared something new' in subj:
        body = (
            f"Hi {item['first']},\n\n"
            "Thanks for the update that hassa.wassa shared something new. I saw your notification and will review the post when I am in Instagram.\n\n"
            "Next step: I will open Instagram today and check the shared post.\n"
        )
    else:
        body = (
            f"Hi {item['first']},\n\n"
            "Thanks for the note that Canva AI has a new message and prompt suggestions for me. I received it and will try one of the suggested prompts.\n\n"
            "Next step: I will open Canva in my next session and test one prompt.\n"
        )
    bodies.append(body)

subjects = []
for item, body in zip(selected, bodies):
    draft_subject = f"[Run {run_marker}] — Reply: {item['subject']}"
    mime = (
        f"To: {item['to']}\r\n"
        f"Subject: {draft_subject}\r\n"
        "Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\r\n"
        "\r\n"
        f"{body}"
    )
    raw = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(mime.encode('utf-8')).decode('ascii').rstrip('=')
    payload = {'message': {'raw': raw}}
    subprocess.run([
        'gws', 'gmail', 'users', 'drafts', 'create',
        '--params', json.dumps({'userId': 'me'}),
        '--json', json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False)
    ], capture_output=True, check=True)
    subjects.append(draft_subject)

print(json.dumps({'count': len(subjects), 'subjects': subjects, 'total_chars': sum(len(b) for b in bodies)}, ensure_ascii=False))
PY
